allow: Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'count: {len\(d[\\"items\\"]\)}'\); print\('first 10:', [i['name'] for i in d['items'][:10]]\)")

Bash(node -e "let s=''; process.stdin.on\('data', c => s+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const d = JSON.parse\(s\); console.log\('passive count:', d.items.length\); const names = d.items.map\(i => i.name\); console.log\('Leftovers?', names.includes\('leftovers'\), 'Eviolite?', names.includes\('eviolite'\), 'Master Ball?', names.includes\('master-ball'\), 'Potion?', names.includes\('potion'\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "let s=''; process.stdin.on\('data', c => s+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const d = JSON.parse\(s\); console.log\('active count:', d.items.length\); const names = d.items.map\(i => i.name\); console.log\('Leftovers?', names.includes\('leftovers'\), 'Choice Band?', names.includes\('choice-band'\), 'Master Ball?', names.includes\('master-ball'\), 'Potion?', names.includes\('potion'\), 'Sitrus Berry?', names.includes\('sitrus-berry'\)\); }\);")
Bash(node -e "let s=''; process.stdin.on\('data', c => s+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const d = JSON.parse\(s\); console.log\('greninja game_indices:', d.game_indices.length\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "let s=''; process.stdin.on\('data', c => s+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const d = JSON.parse\(s\); const en = d.flavor_text_entries.filter\(e => e.language.name === 'en'\); const versions = Array.from\(new Set\(en.map\(e => e.version.name\)\)\); console.log\('greninja species en versions:', versions\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "let s=''; process.stdin.on\('data', c => s+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const d = JSON.parse\(s\); console.log\('greninja regional dex entries:', d.pokedex_numbers.map\(p => p.pokedex.name\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "let s=''; process.stdin.on\('data', c => s+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const d = JSON.parse\(s\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(d.varieties.map\(v => \({ name: v.pokemon.name, is_default: v.is_default }\)\), null, 2\)\); }\);")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } | Select-Object Id, Name, MainWindowTitle)
